description: Calculate the tip distribution for restaurant staff based on a total tip pool of $2,850. The distribution must follow a 20/80 split between support and service staff, with individual shares proportional to hours worked and accounting for multi-role staff. Save the results to /home/ga/Documents/tip_distribution.csv.

natural_language.prompt: Complete the tip pooling spreadsheet for restaurant staff. The total tips are $2,850. Support staff get 20%, service staff get 80%. Distribute proportionally based on hours worked. One staff member worked both roles.
